title: OptimisticMC
description: This mod collection will allow you to play Minecraft with higher FPS, if you have a very weak computer you should download it. Even if you have a powerful enough PC you should also try my collection.
body:
# 🚀 OptimisticMC: Peak Performance for Everyone
OptimisticMC is a meticulously curated mod collection designed to squeeze every bit of performance out of your hardware. Whether you are playing on an aging laptop or a high-end gaming rig, this pack ensures your Minecraft experience is buttery smooth and stutter-free.

### ✨ Why choose OptimisticMC?
Extreme FPS Boost: Advanced optimization of the graphics engine and data processing.
Lightweight & Clean: Only essential performance mods—no bloatware, no unnecessary features.
Multiplayer Ready: Perfectly optimized for both solo survival and large-scale server play.
### 🛠 Installation & Setup:
Download: We recommend using the Modrinth App for the best experience.
Allocate RAM (Mandatory): Go to the "Java and memory" tab, check "Custom memory allocation," and set your maximum RAM. This is required before your first launch to ensure stability.
Stay Updated: If you are using the Modrinth App, click the "Update all" button to get the latest performance patches.
## 🐛 Feedback & Support
Found a bug or experiencing a crash? Let us know!
Contact: [OptimisticMC report](https://t.me/optimisticMC).
